overview: ServiceHub is a marketplace platform connecting service providers and clients. Providers post services across 7 categories, clients request quotes with photo attachments, and Stripe escrow handles secure payments. Features include auto-invoices, star ratings, and a real-time notification bell.
features: 7 service categories: Home Repair, Cleaning, Design, IT, Marketing, Garden, Other
Quote requests with optional photo attachments and flexible provider replies
Stripe escrow: payment held until client confirms work is done
Auto-generated invoices viewable and printable by both parties
1-5 star ratings with comments on provider profiles
Real-time notification bell for quotes, replies, bookings, and payments
All data from real backend — zero mock content
